name: Coconut Fried Shrimp
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the shrimp, leaving tails intact; devein if desired.
2. Combine pancake mix and beer in a small bowl until smooth.
3. Pour vegetable oil to a depth of 2 inches into a Dutch oven and heat to 350°F.
4. Dredge each shrimp in flour, shaking off excess.
5. Dip the shrimp into the batter, then coat with coconut.
6. Fry the shrimp, a few at a time, for 45 seconds on each side or until golden brown.
7. Drain on paper towels.
